text.text:
For first level, gain the ability of The Twist.
For second level, gain the ability of The Infinitum, deal extra damage and knockback to boss and player, lifesteal and extra negative effects.
For third&last level, gain the second level's effect additionally.

effects: Requires 1 ability slot for first level
Requires 1 upgrade slot for second level
Requires 1 delusion slot for third level
Only items that can be affected by the Ring of the Seven Curses can have this modifier
Alteration of the §6Fourth Curse: Always deal full damage
